title: hieracium virosum subsp. foliosum
intro: Hieracium virosum subsp. foliosum, also known as the green-stemmed hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hieracium virosum subsp. foliosum include reducing inflammation, improving gut health, and potentially acting as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
